summary: Software engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and cloud infrastructure. Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams, deliver high-availability systems, and reduce operational costs through automation.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led migration of monolithic application to microservices architecture, reducing deployment time by 60% and improving system reliability to 99.9% uptime.
Designed and implemented a real-time data pipeline processing 500K+ events per day using AWS Lambda and SQS.
Mentored a team of 4 junior engineers, conducting weekly code reviews and establishing engineering best practices.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained RESTful APIs serving 1M+ monthly active users using Node.js and PostgreSQL.
Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform, cutting environment setup time from 2 days to 30 minutes.
Reduced customer-reported bugs by 40% by introducing end-to-end testing with Cypress.

projects.name: Open Source CLI Tool
bullets: Built a developer productivity CLI tool with 800+ GitHub stars, automating repetitive local dev workflows.
Published to PyPI with automated CI/CD releasing new versions on every tagged commit.

projects.name: Personal Finance Dashboard
bullets: Developed a full-stack web app to track expenses and visualize spending trends with interactive charts.
